calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-30-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Hilary Lamar for and with Eugene Payne.

Ms. Lamar and Mr. Payne explained that 5 units in two buildings were rehabilated, that rental values in both buildings increased, that the payment to Mr. Leveroni was for management of the rehabilation/construction to the buildings, that everyone including Mr. Leveroni played a roll in finding renters and collecting rents, and that Hank (the Uncle) wanted the work done to the properties and that he was in agreement with the amount paid to Mr. Leveroni. The accounting petition was granted (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Ruiz.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-11-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Hilary Lamar for Eugene Payne III.

The Court granted the Petition For Probate of Will and For Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Aguerre.
